title: JSON ask hook (permissionDecision=ask) escalates an allow-listed Write to a confirmation -> ASK wins over allow Write(*)

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P9-hooks-vs-permission/e-hook-ask-over-allow/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Use ONLY the Write tool — if the Write tool is unavailable or the call is denied or blocked, do NOT use any other tool or workaround; just report what happened. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.
probes.result_text: The Write tool call was denied with the message: "probe: recording ask, denying to avoid side effects"

hypothesis: 『hook で確認制に格上げ』: allow Write(*) で自動許諾のはずの操作を、hook の permissionDecision=ask がユーザ確認へエスカレートできる(hooks docs: ask = Escalate to user)。運用価値が高い形(広い allow + 特定操作だけ確認)の実装可否を測る。allow 規則単独なら ALLOWED になるはずなので、ASK が観測されれば hook の ask が allow を上書きした証拠。
